title: How We Optimized Anaplan for a Fortune 500 Tech Company
excerpt: Reduced compression cycles from 8 weeks to 3 weeks while integrating legacy territory systems.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: A Fortune 500 technology company had implemented Anaplan 18 months earlier, but their compression cycles were still taking 8 weeks. Sales teams waited weeks for comp clarity, and the finance team was spending 60% of their time on manual reconciliation across Anaplan and three legacy systems. Despite having the right platform, they weren't getting the ROI they needed.
bullets: Territory system not integrated with Anaplan
Sales ops team frustrated with lack of visibility

solution.title: Our Approach
solution.description: We didn't replace Anaplan. We completed it. We designed a data integration layer that automated the manual processes, streamlined the comp calculation workflow, and connected territories directly into Anaplan's calculations.
approach: Automated territory-to-quota sync from legacy system
Rebuilt comp calculation logic to eliminate manual steps
Created real-time dashboards for what-if modeling
Implemented validation rules to catch data errors before processing

testimonial.quote: BHG didn't replace our Anaplan investment. They unlocked it. We went from drowning in spreadsheets to having real-time visibility into compensation impact. This is what we bought Anaplan for in the first place.
testimonial.author: VP of Finance Operations

nextSteps: We continue to optimize their quarterly planning process

title: Varicent Optimization for a $2B Mid-Market Distributor
excerpt: Unified territories across 5 regions and reduced manual compensation cycles by 85%.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: A mid-market beverage distributor had Varicent in place but was using it like a reporting tool, not an optimization engine. Territories were managed across regional spreadsheets with no consistency. Their sales comp cycles were unpredictable—sometimes 4 weeks, sometimes 8—because data quality issues required manual intervention at each stage.
bullets: Data quality issues in 30% of comp runs
No standardized comp methodology across regions
Sales reps didn't trust comp calculations

solution.title: Our Approach
solution.description: We established a single source of truth for territories and comp calculations across all regions. We implemented Varicent as intended—as a strategic planning tool, not just a reporting system.
approach: Built data validation rules into Varicent workflows
Trained regional teams on standardized comp methodology
Created region-specific dashboards for comp visibility

testimonial.quote: Our regional teams finally trust the comp numbers coming out of Varicent. BHG didn't build us something new—they taught us how to use what we had invested in. That's worth a lot to us.
testimonial.author: Chief Revenue Officer

nextSteps: Implementing incentive modeling for new product launches
Building predictive ramp curves for new hire comp

title: NetSuite SPM Optimization for a Global Enterprise
excerpt: Integrated NetSuite SPM across 12 countries with 40+ comp plans and real-time forecasting.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: An enterprise software company had NetSuite SPM deployed globally but was struggling with complexity. 40 different compensation plans, 12 countries with different tax/regulatory requirements, and no unified way to forecast impact of changes. The comp team had grown to 8 people just to manage the processes, and cycle times were unpredictable.
bullets: Manual reviews at each approval stage
8-person comp team managing a manual process

solution.title: Our Approach
solution.description: We built a governance layer on top of NetSuite that automated approvals, created regional templates that scaled globally, and implemented real-time forecasting for what-if analysis.
approach: Created regional comp templates with country-specific rules
Built automated approval workflows based on business rules
Designed training program to enable comp team to own the system

testimonial.quote: We thought we needed to replace NetSuite. What we really needed was to unlock it. BHG showed us that the right process design and automation can make a global SPM program manageable and strategic.
testimonial.author: Chief Financial Officer

nextSteps: Expanding forecasting to include revenue impact models
Building self-service dashboards for regional teams
